title: IT Support Specialist CMS
description:
Deine Rolle im Team
We are looking for an IT Support Specialist to provide first- and second-level support for our compound management system and related IT applications.
We are currently working on rolling out the new compound management system to our subsidiaries in various European countries (from Belgium to Turkey), so you would get in touch with people from many different regions.
This is a varied role combing IT support, system configuration and technical tasks which offers opportunities to further develop technical and programming skills.
You provide 1st & 2nd level IT support (troubleshooting, incident resolution, user support, ...).
You configure and maintain the compound management system (users, roles, settings).
You support system updates and you are responsible for testing and basic documentation.
You assist with simple system customizations and integrations.
You collaborate with internal teams and external vendors on technical issues.

Unser Angebot
Your starting salary will depend on your qualifications and experience and starts at EUR 49.000 gross per year (based on full-time employment).

Technologien und Skills
Python
PostgreSQL
DB2
Java

Unsere Erwartungen an dich:
Qualifikationen
Basic knowledge of programming or scripting (e.g. Python, Java, PostgreSQL, DB2).
Strong problem-solving skills and a service-oriented mindset.
Ability to work in German and English.
Basic knowledge of databases or system integrations.

Erfahrung
Experience with management, ERP, or facility/asset management systems.
Experience in 1st & 2nd level IT support.
Experience working with Artificial intelligence.

Ausbildung
Education or experience in IT or a related field.

Benefits
Mitarbeiterprämie
Paten- & Mentor- Programm
Gesundheitsförderung
Mitarbeitervergünstigungen
Notebook zur Privatnutzung
Flexible Arbeitszeiten
Frisches Obst
Home Office
Mitarbeiterparkplatz
Kantine/Betriebsrestaurant
Team Events
Essenszulage
Betriebsarzt
Handy zur Privatnutzung
No Dresscode
Mitarbeiterdarlehen
Poolcar
